description: Design a complete 1-bedroom vacation rental cabin from scratch in Sweet Home 3D starting from the empty plan. The cabin must feature enclosed exterior walls and interior partition walls dividing the space into at least four named rooms: Living Room, Bedroom, Bathroom, and Kitchen. Include at least one exterior door, two interior doors, and four windows. Furnish the cabin with at least one bed, one sofa, one table, four chairs, two kitchen appliances, one toilet, and one sink. Document key clearances with at least three dimension lines. Save the completed plan to ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/vacation_cabin.sh3d.
